archetypes.MIDDLEWARE: The bridge between legacy systems and the user interface.
archetypes.THE_LEDGER: Automated record-keeping, audit trails, and site logging.
archetypes.THE_SNIPER: High-urgency monitoring for flash deals or price drops.
archetypes.THE_FORFEIT: Direct financial stakes and loss aversion mechanisms.
archetypes.AGGREGATOR: Centralizing fragmented data into a shared identity network.
